name: EIP-2981 Royalty Enforcement
description: Read EIP-2981 royalty info from any NFT collection and route the correct payment to the creator on every secondary sale your agent executes. Demonstrates respect for creator economics — a Normies-friendly skill.

steps.description: royaltyInfo(tokenId, salePrice) → (receiver, amount). Compute these BEFORE quoting the sale.
In a single tx: transfer NFT to buyer, pay `amount` to `receiver`, pay (salePrice - amount) to seller.

must_contain_both.comment: ERC-721 transfer of NFT to buyer.
Payment of at least royalty amount to the EIP-2981 receiver.
